description: Data loaded from CSV file: 221.csv (Dataset: Traveler Trip Dataset )

fields.name: Trip ID
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: Trip ID uniquely identifies each individual traveler's trip within the Traveler Trip Dataset, serving as a sequential numeric trip reference.

fields.name: Destination
fields.sample_values: "Berlin, Germany", Hawaii, Rio de Janeiro, Cape Town, "Paris, France", ..., "Sydney, AUS", Thailand, Greece, "Phuket, Thailand", Amsterdam
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the geographic endpoint or location (city, country, or region) that a traveler visited or intended to visit during their trip, representing popular international travel destinations.

fields.name: Start date
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the calendar date on which a traveler's trip began, typically used to track the start of individual travel itineraries in a trip management or booking context.

fields.name: End date
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the calendar date when a traveler's trip concluded, indicating the end point of each travel journey in the dataset.

fields.name: Duration (days)
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field represents the total length, in days, of individual traveler trips recorded in the dataset, likely indicating how long each person spent traveling or on vacation.

fields.name: Traveler name
fields.sample_values: Amanda Chen, Frank Li, Emily Johnson, Charlie Lee, Carlos Garcia, ..., Olivia Green, Olivia Kim, Michael Davis, Ana Hernandez, Lily Nguyen
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the full names of individual travelers who made trips, serving as unique identifiers within the travel dataset.

fields.name: Traveler age
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the age in years of individual travelers participating in trips, likely used to analyze traveler demographics and trends within the travel industry.

fields.name: Traveler gender
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the self-identified gender of travelers (male or female) in a travel-related context, likely used for demographic analysis or segmentation.

fields.name: Traveler nationality
fields.sample_values: Taiwan, Germany, Cambodia, Moroccan, nan, ..., French, USA, Canadian, Scottish, South Korean
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the country or national origin of each traveler in the trip dataset, indicating their citizenship or self-identified nationality for travel analysis or profiling purposes.

fields.name: Accommodation type
fields.sample_values: Villa, Resort, Airbnb, Vacation rental, nan, Hotel, Guesthouse, Hostel, Riad
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field indicates the category of lodging chosen by travelers during their trips, capturing various accommodation types such as hotels, villas, guesthouses, and vacation rentals within the travel and tourism industry.

fields.name: Accommodation cost
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field captures the reported monetary cost of accommodation incurred by travelers during their trips, expressed in various currency formats and sometimes without explicit currency labels.

fields.name: Transportation type
fields.sample_values: Car, Plane, Train, Ferry, Bus, Car rental, Airplane, nan, Flight, Subway
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field captures the mode of transportation used by travelers during their trips, indicating the specific type of vehicle or service (e.g., car, bus, flight) chosen for travel segments in the context of trip or travel planning.

fields.name: Transportation cost
fields.inferred_semantic_summary: This field records the monetary amount paid by travelers for transportation during their trip, typically expressed in US dollars, reflecting travel expenses such as flights, trains, or other transit modes.

formatted_summary:
## Table 1: Traveler_Trip_Dataset_ (139 rows × 13 columns)

### Description
Data loaded from CSV file: 221.csv (Dataset: Traveler Trip Dataset )

### Schema (13 fields)
  - Trip ID -- type: int64, values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, ..., 135, 136, 137, 138, 139
  - Destination -- type: object, values: "Berlin, Germany", Hawaii, Rio de Janeiro, Cape Town, "Paris, France", ..., "Sydney, AUS", Thailand, Greece, "Phuket, Thailand", Amsterdam
  - Start date -- type: object, values: 3/5/2023, 5/10/2022, 6/20/2023, 3/10/2024, 9/20/2022, ..., 10/5/2022, 2/5/2022, 7/12/2022, 10/20/2023, 9/1/2021
  - End date -- type: object, values: 3/20/2022, 9/8/2023, 5/10/2022, 4/22/2023, 2/19/2023, ..., 5/18/2022, 10/20/2023, 1/24/2024, 7/10/2021, 5/14/2023
  - Duration (days) -- type: float64, values: 5.0, 6.0, 7.0, 8.0, 9.0, ..., nan, 11.0, 13.0, 14.0, nan
  - Traveler name -- type: object, values: Amanda Chen, Frank Li, Emily Johnson, Charlie Lee, Carlos Garcia, ..., Olivia Green, Olivia Kim, Michael Davis, Ana Hernandez, Lily Nguyen
  - Traveler age -- type: float64, values: nan, 20.0, 23.0, 24.0, 25.0, ..., 48.0, 50.0, 55.0, 60.0, nan
  - Traveler gender -- type: object, values: Male, Female, nan
  - Traveler nationality -- type: object, values: Taiwan, Germany, Cambodia, Moroccan, nan, ..., French, USA, Canadian, Scottish, South Korean
  - Accommodation type -- type: object, values: Villa, Resort, Airbnb, Vacation rental, nan, Hotel, Guesthouse, Hostel, Riad
  - Accommodation cost -- type: object, values: "$1,400 ", $350 , $700 , 1500 USD, nan, ..., $150 , 600 USD, 100, 200 USD, 400
  - Transportation type -- type: object, values: Car, Plane, Train, Ferry, Bus, Car rental, Airplane, nan, Flight, Subway
  - Transportation cost -- type: object, values: $250 , $20 , $700 , nan, 3000, ..., $100 , 100, 600 USD, 200 USD, 400

### Sample Data (first 5 rows)
```

1        2  Phuket, Thailand  6/15/2023  6/20/2023              5.0       Jane Doe          28.0          Female             Canadian             Resort                800              Flight                 500
2        3   Bali, Indonesia   7/1/2023   7/8/2023              7.0      David Lee          45.0            Male               Korean              Villa               1000              Flight                 700
3        4     New York, USA  8/15/2023  8/29/2023             14.0  Sarah Johnson          29.0          Female              British              Hotel               2000              Flight                1000
```
